title: post api auth login with valid credentials
description: Test the POST /api/auth/login endpoint with valid user credentials to verify successful authentication and receipt of a JWT token with a 200 status response.

title: get api users with valid token
description: Test the GET /api/users endpoint with a valid Authorization Bearer token to verify retrieval of an array of user profiles with a 200 status response.

title: get api buses with valid token
description: Test the GET /api/buses endpoint with a valid Authorization Bearer token to verify retrieval of an array of bus models and their status with a 200 status response.

title: get api routes with valid token
description: Test the GET /api/routes endpoint with a valid Authorization Bearer token to verify retrieval of an array of bus routes with a 200 status response.

title: get api schedules with valid token and valid query
description: Test the GET /api/schedules endpoint with a valid Authorization Bearer token and valid query parameters to verify retrieval of an array of bus schedules with a 200 status response.

title: get api dayoff with valid token
description: Test the GET /api/dayoff endpoint with a valid Authorization Bearer token to verify retrieval of an array of day-off requests with a 200 status response.

title: get api emergency with valid token and permissions
description: Test the GET /api/emergency endpoint with a valid Authorization Bearer token and sufficient permissions to verify retrieval of an array of emergency reports with a 200 status response.

title: get api notifications with valid token
description: Test the GET /api/notifications endpoint with a valid Authorization Bearer token to verify retrieval of an array of user notifications with a 200 status response.

title: get api chat with valid token
description: Test the GET /api/chat endpoint with a valid Authorization Bearer token to verify retrieval of an array of chat messages with a 200 status response.

title: get api rules with valid token and authorized role
description: Test the GET /api/rules endpoint with a valid Authorization Bearer token and authorized user role to verify retrieval of an array of scheduling and operational rules with a 200 status response.
